reviews.comment:
Si uno pasa a la hora de almuerzo o cena, no hay un servicio de comida adecuado. No salen de las empanadas y de los sandwich de jamón crudo y queso en pan casero, los que serían más aceptable si les pusieran algo más que una feta de cada uno. He comido muy buenos sándwich de JyQ en S. Juan, pero no en ese YPF.

(Translated by Google)
If you go there at lunchtime or dinnertime, the food service isn't decent. They only offer empanadas and ham and cheese sandwiches on homemade bread, which would be more acceptable if they put more than just a slice of each cheese in them. I've had some very good ham and cheese sandwiches in San Juan, but not at that YPF station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtMXVicGFREAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
No pongo 5 estrellas xq al ser la única estación por varios km le falta un pelin mejorar la limpieza de los baños y a la noche no aceptan débito

(Translated by Google)
I'm not giving it 5 stars because, being the only station for several kilometers, the cleanliness of the bathrooms could be improved a bit, and they don't accept debit cards at night.
